summary: Full e2e testing of AutoNorth Motors - all backend APIs and frontend flows tested. 18/18 backend tests pass. All major UI flows working correctly.

issues: Hero image shows a person with tools (not an automotive image) - may appear slightly off-brand, but acceptable as stock image
Some vehicle card images are generic stock images (not matching exact vehicles) - minor brand concern

critical_code_review_comments: server.py secure=False on cookie set - cookies not marked secure in production, fine for preview but should be secure=True in prod
Admin password seeding updates if changed (idempotent) - GOOD implementation
CORS allows frontend URL + localhost:3000 only - correct
seed_data_creation: Lead created during form submission test (Test User, test@example.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. Backend: auth, vehicles CRUD, leads CRUD, stats all pass. Frontend: homepage, inventory, vehicle detail (contact form with success state), financing calculator (sliders), admin login/dashboard/inventory/leads all working. Add Vehicle modal opens correctly from admin inventory. Lead detail panel opens on row click in admin leads.
